title: Section 22
content: For the purpose of 1[enabling an Institute] to discharge its functions efficiently under this Act, the Central Government may, after due appropriation made by Parliament by law in this behalf, pay to the Institute in each financial year such sums of money and in such manner as it may think fit.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 18, ibid., for "enabling the Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020).
